---
version: "1.0"

pack: iso27001
name: "ISO/IEC 27001:2022"
description: >-
  ISO/IEC 27001:2022 information security management controls mapped to Velocity
  guardrails. Covers Annex A controls relevant to software development and change
  management. Velocity enforces the technical controls automatable at the agent
  and CI layer. Human ISMS processes (risk register, management review) are out
  of scope for Velocity enforcement.

risk_score_multiplier: 1.2 # Applied by risk-score skill when this pack is active

controls:
  # ─── A.8 — Technology Controls ────────────────────────────────────────────

  A.8.2:
    title: "Privileged access rights"
    description: "Restrict and manage privileged access."
    velocity_enforcement:
      - enterprise_controls: enabled
        privileged_roles_only:
          ["security-lead", "engineering-lead", "compliance-officer"]
        applies_to: ["auth_files", "infrastructure_files", "ci_cd_files"]
      - pre_tool_use_hook:
          pattern: "(?i)(sudo|su\\s|chmod 777|chmod o\\+w)"
          action: warn
          message: "ISO 27001 A.8.2 — Privileged operation detected. Confirm this is authorized and necessary."

  A.8.4:
    title: "Access to source code"
    description: "Restrict access to source code, development tools, and software libraries."
    velocity_enforcement:
      - audit_trail: enabled
        scope: "All code changes, guardrail overrides, and artifact writes."
    evidence_artifact: ".velocity/artifacts/audit/{YYYY-MM}.jsonl"

  A.8.8:
    title: "Management of technical vulnerabilities"
    description: "Obtain timely information about technical vulnerabilities and take action."
    velocity_enforcement:
      - guardrail: dependency_vulnerability_scan
        value: true
      - guardrail: secrets_scan_required
        value: true
      - ci_check: "Vulnerability scan on every PR that modifies dependency files."

  A.8.9:
    title: "Configuration management"
    description: "Configurations are securely managed."
    velocity_enforcement:
      - pre_tool_use_hook:
          pattern: "(?i)(api_key|secret_key|password|token|credentials)\\s*[:=]\\s*['\"][^'\"]{8,}"
          action: warn
          message: "ISO 27001 A.8.9 — Potential secret in configuration. Store secrets in environment variables or a secrets manager."

  A.8.12:
    title: "Data leakage prevention"
    description: "Apply measures to prevent data leakage."
    velocity_enforcement:
      - risk_score_signal: pii_files
        points: 20
      - pre_tool_use_hook:
          pattern: "(?i)(console\\.log|print|logger\\.(info|debug)).*(?i)(password|token|secret|ssn|dob|credit)"
          action: warn
          message: "ISO 27001 A.8.12 — Potential sensitive data in log statement. Remove or mask before committing."

  A.8.13:
    title: "Information backup"
    description: "Backups of information, software, and systems are maintained."
    velocity_enforcement:
      - pre_tool_use_hook:
          pattern: "(?i)(drop database|drop schema)"
          action: block
          message: "ISO 27001 A.8.13 — Database destruction blocked. Confirm backup exists and is verified before any destructive operation."

  A.8.16:
    title: "Monitoring activities"
    description: "Monitor systems to detect anomalous behavior."
    velocity_enforcement:
      - audit_trail: enabled
        scope: "All agent actions, guardrail blocks, approval events, artifact writes."
    evidence_artifact: ".velocity/artifacts/audit/"

  A.8.19:
    title: "Installation of software on operational systems"
    description: "Control installation of software on operational systems."
    velocity_enforcement:
      - pre_tool_use_hook:
          pattern: "(?i)(npm install|pip install|go get|apt install|brew install)"
          action: warn
          message: "ISO 27001 A.8.19 — Dependency installation detected. Confirm the package is from an approved source and has been vulnerability-scanned."

  A.8.24:
    title: "Use of cryptography"
    description: "Ensure proper and effective use of cryptography."
    velocity_enforcement:
      - pre_tool_use_hook:
          pattern: "(?i)(md5|sha1|des|3des|rc4).*(?i)(encrypt|hash|sign)"
          action: block
          message: "ISO 27001 A.8.24 — Weak or deprecated cryptographic algorithm detected. Use AES-256, SHA-256+, or RSA-2048+ as appropriate."

  A.8.25:
    title: "Secure development lifecycle"
    description: "Rules for secure development of software are established."
    velocity_enforcement:
      - guardrail: tdd_loop_required
        value: true
        rationale: "TDD loop enforces design-before-implement, reducing security defects."
      - guardrail: vertical_slice_required
        value: true
        rationale: "Vertical slices ensure security is tested at every layer."
      - guardrail: slice_has_tests_at_all_layers
        value: true

  A.8.26:
    title: "Application security requirements"
    description: "Security requirements are identified and applied during development."
    velocity_enforcement:
      - guardrail: security_review_required
        value: true
      - adr_required: true
        trigger: "any new authentication mechanism, data encryption choice, or public API design"
    evidence_artifact: ".velocity/artifacts/adrs/"

  A.8.27:
    title: "Secure system architecture and engineering principles"
    description: "Principles of secure system engineering are applied."
    velocity_enforcement:
      - guardrail: deep_module_enforcement
        value: true
        rationale: "Deep modules reduce attack surface by minimising public interfaces."
      - skill: improve-codebase-architecture
        frequency: "periodic (after each sprint surge)"

  A.8.28:
    title: "Secure coding"
    description: "Secure coding principles are applied."
    velocity_enforcement:
      - risk_score: enabled
        approval_threshold: 50
      - pre_tool_use_hooks:
          - pattern: "(?i)eval\\s*\\("
            action: warn
            message: "ISO 27001 A.8.28 — eval() detected. Dynamic code execution is a common injection vector. Use a safe alternative."
          - pattern: "(?i)(exec|system|popen|subprocess\\.call)\\s*\\([^)]*\\$"
            action: warn
            message: "ISO 27001 A.8.28 — Shell injection risk. Do not pass unsanitized variables to shell execution functions."

  A.8.29:
    title: "Security testing in development and acceptance"
    description: "Security testing processes are defined and implemented."
    velocity_enforcement:
      - guardrail: test_coverage_minimum
        value: 80
      - guardrail: slice_has_tests_at_all_layers
        value: true
      - validate_skill: enabled
        check: security_gate
        blocks_merge: true

  A.8.32:
    title: "Change management"
    description: "Changes to information processing facilities are controlled."
    velocity_enforcement:
      - approval_workflow: enabled
        triggers: ["high_risk_score", "breaking_change", "infrastructure_files"]
      - guardrail: breaking_change_approval_required
        value: true
      - audit_trail: enabled
        scope: "Every guardrail override, approval decision, and artifact write."
    evidence_artifact: ".velocity/artifacts/approvals/"

  A.8.33:
    title: "Test information"
    description: "Test information is appropriately selected, protected, and managed."
    velocity_enforcement:
      - pre_tool_use_hook:
          pattern: "(?i)(production|prod).*(?i)(database|db|connection_string)"
          action: block
          message: "ISO 27001 A.8.33 — Production database reference in what may be a test context. Never use production data in test environments."

  # ─── A.5 — Organizational Controls ───────────────────────────────────────

  A.5.14:
    title: "Information transfer"
    description: "Information transfer policies and procedures are in place."
    velocity_enforcement:
      - pre_tool_use_hook:
          pattern: "(?i)http://(?!localhost|127\\.0\\.0\\.1)"
          action: warn
          message: "ISO 27001 A.5.14 — Non-HTTPS URL in code. Information transfers must use encrypted channels."

  A.5.23:
    title: "Information security for use of cloud services"
    description: "Security requirements for cloud service use are established."
    velocity_enforcement:
      - risk_score_signal: infrastructure_files
        points: 10
      - approval_workflow: enabled
        triggers: ["infrastructure_files", "ci_cd_files"]

# Evidence collection
evidence:
  audit_log: ".velocity/artifacts/audit/"
  retention_days: 365
  approvals: ".velocity/artifacts/approvals/"
  adrs: ".velocity/artifacts/adrs/"

reporting:
  period: annual
  evidence_export_skill: "Collect .velocity/artifacts/audit/*.jsonl + approvals + adrs for the reporting period. Export to .velocity/artifacts/compliance/iso27001-evidence-{YYYY}.zip"
---
